CustomField.formula: CASE( MOD(DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(TODAY()), 1) - 1 - DATE(1900, 1, 7), 7), 0, DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(TODAY()), 1) - 3, /* Dimanche */ 6, DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(TODAY()), 1) - 2, /* Samedi */ DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(TODAY()), 1) - 1 /* Autres jours */ )
CustomField.label: Formule dernier jour ouvrant
